title: break frame
text: break frame An optional frame in reports, that is activated by the printbreak ProcScript statement. It is used to show temporary variable information, such as the current date, page number, and so on. Related Links Headers, Footers, and Break Frames Report components (and form components intended for printing) can have headers and footers that appear at the top and bottom of printed pages, and inline headers or page breaks. These are defined using header frames, footer frames, and break frames. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
